home.title: SQW Survey
home.description: Visualize your team's health with the Square Wheel Survey. It takes about 5 minutes.
home.respondentNotice: If you are a respondent, please access the survey via the invitation URL shared by the survey organizer.

survey.resultsNotAvailable: Team results are not yet available.
survey.resultsWaiting: Please wait until the survey organizer makes the results visible.
survey.privateNotice: These results are visible only to you. They are not shared with other members.

team.createdDescription: Use the links below to invite team members and access the organizer dashboard.
team.adminUrlWarning: * This link cannot be displayed again. Make sure to copy and save it.
team.joinDescription: You've been invited to the "{teamName}" survey. Your responses are anonymous.
team.alreadyCompleted: You have already completed this survey.
team.releaseModeManualDesc: Results are published when the survey organizer clicks 'Make Results Visible'
team.releaseModeAllCompletedDesc: Results are published automatically when all expected members have responded (regardless of deadline)
team.releaseModeOnDeadlineDesc: Results are published automatically at the deadline (even if not everyone has responded)
team.leaderNameHint: The person respondents should have in mind
team.inviteMessagePlaceholder: e.g., Please help us improve our team!
team.invitedBy: This survey is an invitation from {leaderName}
team.adminEmailLabel: Your email address (organizer URL will be sent here)
team.memberEmailLabel: Email (optional) - Get notified when team results are available
team.resetConfirm: Reset this response? This action cannot be undone.
team.resetNote: After reset, ask the member to reopen the invite URL in a new browser or incognito window.
team.projectCreatedDesc: Share the invite links with your team members. You can manage results from the organizer dashboard.
team.errorReleaseMode: Please select when to publish results
team.surveyVersion26Desc: 26 statistically validated questions. Takes about 5 minutes.
team.surveyVersion40Desc: 40-question version for clients who need continuity with past data. Takes about 8 minutes.
team.managementTrustDesc: Recommended when conducting an organizational survey. Does not affect team output.
team.qualitativeDesc: Add free-text questions for respondents. Answers are shared with the organizer only.
team.qualitativeDefault: What challenges or concerns do you have working in this team?
team.qualitativeAiHint: If you plan to use the AI report, we recommend keeping the first question.
team.emailFormatError: Please enter a valid email address (e.g. name@example.com)
team.leaderDefinitionHint: This survey includes questions about the team leader. To avoid confusion, we recommend specifying in your invitation message who should be considered the leader.
team.aiReportDesc: AI analyzes your response data to generate a personalized report.
team.aiReportTeamDesc: AI analyzes the entire team's response data to generate a team report.
team.aiReportError: Failed to generate report. Please try again later.
team.aiReportPurchaseBody:
The Team AI Report is one report per team. If someone has already purchased it, this will be a duplicate purchase.

We recommend checking with your leader or survey organizer before purchasing.

*Once purchased and generated, the report is available to all team members for free.
*Purchases are non-refundable.
team.leaderDefinitionExample:
Example:
- "Please answer as if [Name] is the team leader for this survey."
- "Please refer to your department manager as the leader."
team.adminUrlDesc: Use this link to access the survey organizer panel. You can check response status and publish results here. This URL is private — do not share it with others.
team.inviteUrlsDesc: Share this link with each team's members. They can complete the survey and view results using this link.
team.retakeNote: * Only your response data for this survey will be cleared. Other website data is not affected.
team.deleteResponseConfirm: Delete this response? The member will need to retake the survey.
team.respondentNameHint: Any name or nickname is fine. This is used only to help the survey organizer identify which response to delete if needed. It will never be shared with others or linked to your answers.
team.bookmarkNotice: You can revisit your results anytime via the invitation URL. We recommend bookmarking it.
team.personalUrlTitle: Your personal results URL (recommended to bookmark)
team.personalUrlDesc: Save this URL to access your results from any browser or device, even if you used private browsing mode.
team.notifyEmailLabel: Get notified when team results are published (optional)
team.notifyEmailSuccess: Registered. You'll be notified when results are published.
team.emailUnregisteredWarning: {count} member(s) have not registered their email address. They will not be notified when results are published.

metadata.title: SQW Survey | Square Wheel Survey
metadata.description: Visualize team health with the Square Wheel Survey. Diagnose organizational wellness through the wagon metaphor.
